3099490.name: Haven
3099490.description:
Project Haven [Internal Name] is a merciless crafting & survival game for 1-12 players set in a procedurally-generated world overthrown by nature. Tame animals, farm the land, build forts and safe havens, slay enemies and learn to harness the very plague that claimed humanity.

Duality

Embrace nature's balance, or aim to harness the very plague that eradicated humanity. Tame cute creatures to gather resources for you, or powerful beasts to defend your home. Farm the land and create useful ecosystems that ensure you maintain a supply of food through each season.

A World Lost to Plague

Haven features a world that that altogether collapsed under the might of The Wither. Survive and explore to learn the origins of the Wither, the factions involved with its creation & spread, and whether a cure even exists.

Bring Your Allies

Join with friends in up to 12 player co-op gameplay. Prioritize key objectives, topple challenging foes and work together to survive the inhospitable wilderness.
